strengths: 15+ years of polyglot fullstack experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and cloud — well above the 6-year threshold with consistent senior/staff-level ownership
Current role at re:cinq includes direct AI-agent infrastructure and MCP framework work, directly matching the AI agent development requirement
Deep, practiced TDD culture: built testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), ran TDD workshops, and applied TDD/pairing/CI methodologies professionally across multiple roles
concerns: Nest.js is absent from the resume entirely — the primary backend framework for this role is unmentioned, leaving its proficiency unknown
Kotlin is not listed as a skill and appears only in passing for robotics/embedded work at Altom; the secondary stack requirement is effectively unmet
No explicit relational database experience (PostgreSQL, MySQL) is demonstrated beyond listing MySQL in the skills section; primary database exposure is MongoDB
response.justification: The candidate brings substantial seniority and a strong TypeScript/Node.js foundation that aligns with the core stack, and their current AI-agent and MCP work at re:cinq is a direct match for one of the role's more differentiating requirements. The main gaps are Nest.js (the primary backend framework) and Kotlin (the secondary language), neither of which appears meaningfully in the resume; both could be bridged given the candidate's demonstrated polyglot adaptability and fast ramp-up history, but they represent real unknowns rather than confirmed strengths.
